evals.prompt: I need to create a custom GrapesJS component type called 'pricing-card' that renders a pricing card with title, price, features list, and a CTA button. It should have traits for the plan name, price amount, currency symbol, and button text. Also register a block for it in the 'Marketing' category.
evals.expected_output: A complete addType definition with model defaults (tagName, traits array with text types), isComponent detection, view rendering, and a BlockManager.add call with content referencing the type

evals.prompt: How do I set up GrapesJS with React using @grapesjs/react? I need a layout with a sidebar for blocks, a canvas in the middle, and a style panel on the right. Also configure localStorage storage with auto-save.
evals.expected_output: A React component using GjsEditor, WithEditor, Canvas, with proper grapesjs.init options including storageManager config for local storage, and a three-column layout

evals.prompt: I want to add a custom trait type 'color-palette' that shows a row of predefined color swatches the user can click to select. When selected, it should set a data-color attribute on the component. Show me how to register this trait type and use it in a component.
evals.expected_output: Complete Traits.addType implementation with createInput (generating swatch buttons), onEvent (handling click, setting data-color attribute), onUpdate (syncing from component to UI), plus a component definition using the custom trait
